arts.ttl: Serie A Preview: Milan vs Cagliari – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction
arts.sum: Saturday's Serie A action completes at Stadio San Siro as high-flying Milan take on relegation-threatened Cagliari. Newly-appointed manager Sergio Conceicao braces up for his touchline debut in Italy's top flight after taking only two games at his new job to win a trophy.
